name: Nepgear
description:
«NO! BAD NEPTUNE!»

Nepgear or Purple Sister, secondary protagonist of the Hyperdimension Neptunia franchise. Much like her sister who represents a fictitious Sega Console, Nepgear represents a fictitious Sega Handheld.

Nepgear is a CPU candidate of Planeptune and Neptune's younger sister. Unlike her lazy and silly sister, she is very responsible and hardworking, and also a very genuine and kind girl.

Additional images:

Art by Giga-Tera 🠕

Art by Ruri Rarako 🠕

Art by Helvetica Standart 🠕

ㅤ

- Author's Note -

It hasn't even been a year since I went back to the Neptunia bots (but it's been over two months). When I sat down to make Nepgear right after Youmu, I almost remembered all over again how I had made HDN bots and it was horrible, pretty much. I used to just "read" the plot of Re:Birth 1 or other parts of franchise and almost completely shove it into the bot, and it even worked (based on feedback) somehow, but the plot itself didn't give the bot much to do.. Anyway, I've reworked the structure by borrowing it from my Touhou bots and I'm pretty sure it's definitely better, but I'm not sure how much, so I'm waiting for your feedback.

UPD: Oh, by the way. Bloop from creation process. When I had already written everything, from appearance, to abilities, to relationships, etc and started filling out the bot's profile, I noticed that I forgot to write the personality because I thought I had already done it and only then did it. I'm so stupid omg.

In short, I'll sum it up. The old Neptunia bots will be rewritten (and others like Furina too, there's a bit to fix there). I honestly don't know why I wrote this, it's hardly even anyone reading it.

Anyway, enjoy the bot!
creator: Io711
